_metadata.description: Complete CZO mapping for ICPEI (Insurance Company of Prince Edward Island). ICPEI has zero proprietary Z-codes; all CSIO codes are standard, resolved through the XML enum factory interfaces. The carrier inherits heavily from the V145/V137/V136/V133/V128/V043 Generic base.

AllPerils.description: All Perils - uses Flat deductible type

SpecifiedPerils.description: Specified Perils - uses Flat deductible type

End5B.description: SEF/NBEF 5B - Permission to Rent or Lease (ICPEI override maps to End5B framework code)

End21B.description: SEF/NBEF 21B - Blanket Basis Fleet Policy (ICPEI override maps to End21B framework code)

End8B.description: SEF/NBEF 8 - Property Damage Reimbursement (ICPEI maps End8 to End8B framework code)

End19B.description: SEF/NBEF 19 - Limited Waiver of Depreciation (ICPEI maps End19 to End19B framework code)

End28C.description: SEF/NBEF 28 - Excluded Operator (ICPEI maps End28 to End28C framework code)

End30B.description: SEF/NBEF 30 - Suspension of Coverage (ICPEI maps End30 to End30B framework code)

AccessoriesExtension.description: SEF/NBEF 37 - Accessories Extension (ICPEI maps AccessoriesExtension to End37)

autoEndorsementsOntario._note: These are inherited from v043/V145 Generic base and available to ICPEI in Ontario province context

Opcf03.description: OPCF 3 - Permission to Drive Named Automobile

Opcf05.description: OPCF 5 - Permission to Rent or Lease

Opcf05C.description: OPCF 5C - Permission to Rent or Lease (Specified Lessee)

Opcf05D.description: OPCF 5D - Permission to Rent or Lease (Government)

Opcf06A.description: OPCF 6A - Permission to Carry Passengers for Compensation

Opcf06D.description: OPCF 6D - Permission to Carry Passengers for Compensation (School)

Opcf13C.description: OPCF 13C - Comprehensive Cover Deletion of Glass

Opcf17.description: OPCF 17 - Permission to Carry Radioactive Material

Opcf27.description: OPCF 27 - Liability for Damage to Non-Owned Automobile

Opcf27B.description: OPCF 27B - Liability for Damage to Non-Owned Automobile (Blanket)

Opcf29.description: OPCF 29 - Physical Damage Coverage on Described Snowmobiles

Opcf44.description: OPCF 44R - Family Protection Coverage (also mapped from csio:44)

Opcf47.description: OPCF 47 - Agreement Not to Recover from Named Persons

LossOfUseBroadForm.description: SEF/NBEF 20A - Loss of Use Broad Form

autoEndorsementsNonOntario._note: These are inherited from v043 Generic base and available to ICPEI in non-Ontario provinces. ICPEI overrides some mappings in TryConvertToFrameworkAutoEndorsement and TryConvertToCsioAutoEndorsement.

End3.description: SEF/NBEF 3 - Permission to Drive Named Automobile

End5.description: SEF/NBEF 5 - Permission to Rent or Lease

End13C.description: SEF/NBEF 13C - Comprehensive Cover Deletion of Glass

End20A.description: SEF/NBEF 20A - Loss of Use Broad Form

End27.description: SEF/NBEF 27 - Liability for Damage to Non-Owned Automobile

homeEndorsements._note: All inherited from v043 Generic base, with V145 additions for GardenTypeTractor and EscapeOfFuelOil override

BooksToolsAndInstruments.description: Books, Tools and Instruments Pertaining to Business

EscapeOfFuelOil.description: Leakage or Overflow of Domestic Fuel Oil (V145 override maps to LEAKF)

GardenTractor.description: Garden Type Tractor liability extension (V145 addition)

autoDiscounts._note: ICPEI overrides 5 auto discounts in CoverageCodeConverter.vb; rest inherited from v043 Generic

MoreAutosThanOperators.description: Vehicle to Operator Ratio Discount (ICPEI override)

autoSurcharges._note: ICPEI overrides 4 auto surcharges in CoverageCodeConverter.vb; rest inherited from v043 Generic

habDiscounts._note: All inherited from v043 Generic base - no ICPEI overrides for hab discounts

AgeOfHome.description: Age of Structure Surcharge (V145 addition from V118)

genericBaseCodes._note: ICPEI inherits ALL generic codes unchanged except where overridden above. The following are the generic auto discount and surcharge codes from v043.

MotorHome.description: Motor Home Recreational Use (always sent for motor homes)

Trailer_TentTrailer.description: Tank Trailer Hauled As Train (maps TentTrailer)

Trailer_CabinHome.description: Common Trailer Uses Tongue and/or Hitch (V135 type)

Motorcycle_NakedSport.description: Naked Sport motorcycle (also maps EntryNakedSport and NakedSuperSportRoadster)

Motorcycle_Trike.description: Three Wheel Motorcycle Excludes 2 Rear Wheels

Motorcycle_ThreeWheelScooter.description: Three Wheel Scooter Excludes 2 Rear Wheels

Motorcycle.description: No vehicle type code sent for motorcycles

MotorHome.description: No vehicle type code sent for motor homes

Trailer.description: Unlicensed Trailer (always sent for personal trailers)

PartnerSameSex.description: Married (ICPEI maps same-sex partner to Married)

companyConstants._note: ICPEI has minimal company constants, none are csio: codes

responseClassification._note: ICPEI does not override IsDiscount/IsSurcharge patterns - uses Generic base classification from v043
responseClassification.isDiscountPatterns: Inherited from v043 Generic base - all standard csio:DIS* auto discount codes and csio:DH* hab discount codes
responseClassification.isSurchargePatterns: Inherited from v043 Generic base - all standard csio:SUR* auto surcharge codes and csio:SH* hab surcharge codes

zCodeInventory._note: ICPEI has ZERO proprietary Z-codes. All CSIO codes used are standard CSIO specification codes resolved through the XML enum factory interfaces.

deductibleType.description: ICPEI uses Flat deductible type for AllPerils, Collision, Comprehensive, and SpecifiedPerils coverages. No deductible type is sent for other coverages.

endorsementLimitOverride.description: For OPCF44/End44 endorsements, the limit is taken from the Liability company field instead of the standard limit field.

endorsementEffectiveDate.description: ICPEI sends a CalculationDate as the endorsement effective date if present in the coverage item fields.

tplSuppression.description: ICPEI suppresses TPL (Third Party Liability) output for both personal and commercial vehicles. TPL is not sent as a separate coverage.

vehicleLiabilityEligibility.description: A vehicle is only eligible for liability coverages if the Liability field has a value greater than 0.

accidentBenefitsSimplified.description: ICPEI sends Accident Benefits (csio:AB) as a simple coverage with no amount or deductible (unlike Generic base which may include more detail).

uninsuredAutomobileSimplified.description: ICPEI sends Uninsured Automobile (csio:UA) as a simple coverage with no amount.

costNewAmtFromOPCF19.description: ICPEI gets CostNewAmt from the StatedValue field of the OPCF19/End19 endorsement attached to the vehicle, rather than the standard vehicle price.

territoryCdSuppressed.description: ICPEI does not send TerritoryCd for vehicles on outbound (it is suppressed in PcVehConverter).

outsideCountryExposure.description: ICPEI calculates LengthTimeVehOutsideCountry by summing all province exposure percentages and converting to days (percent/100 * 365).

driverClassification.description: ICPEI classifies occasional drivers as: Occasional05 (female/GenderX) or Occasional06 (male). Drivers become Secondary if they have 8+ years experience or the vehicle is commercial.

licenseClassMapping_NB.description: For New Brunswick province, ICPEI maps G1/7-1 license class to 'LN' and G2/7-2 to 'PR'. Other provinces use standard mapping.

foreignLicenseFiltering.description: ICPEI removes foreign licenses from the license collection output (removes licenses with class 'FL').

creditScoreConsent.description: ICPEI uses custom consent codes: '1' for Yes consent, '0' for No or default. Consent is only sent when a matching person with explicit consent is found.

insuredPrincipalIDs.description: ICPEI uses custom InsuredOrPrincipal IDs: 'Desktop' for primary individual insured, 'COMPANY' for primary corporation, 'COAPP' for additional insured.

contractTermWithTimes.description: ICPEI sends both start and end times (not just dates) on the contract term.

addressValidation.description: ICPEI sends AddrValidationdInd (true/false) based on the address validation status.

remarksPrioritySeverityMapping.description: ICPEI maps remark priority to severity: 1=Critical, 2=Exclamation, 3=Information, default=Information.

notes: ICPEI has zero proprietary Z-codes. All CSIO codes are standard specification codes.
ICPEI CompanyConstants.vb contains only operational values (Yes/No/IDs), no csio: code constants.
ICPEI CsioConstants.vb adds only AttachedEquipmentType.RefrigerationSystem (not a csio: code).
ICPEI exists only in V146 - single version, no multi-version complexity.
Inheritance chain: V146 ICPEI -> V145 Generic -> V137 Generic -> V136 Generic -> V133 Generic -> V128 Generic -> V043 Generic
